creator: leo9641@yandex.ru
text:
Hello,

I installed latest ISO image FreeBSD-12.0-CURRENT-arm64-aarch64-RPI3-20180110-r327788.img (FreeBSD 12.0-CURRENT #0 r327788: Thu Jan 11 17:16:59 UTC 2018) to my device. When I tune on soft update journaling RPI3 don't boot. Below out from serial console:


root@generic:~ # shutdown -r now

Shutdown NOW!
shutdown: [pid 2254]
root@generic:~ #                                                 Stopping cron.
Waiting for PIDS: 2204.
Stopping sshd.
Waiting for PIDS: 2200.
Stopping devd.
Waiting for PIDS: 1924.
Writing entropy file:.
Writing early boot entropy file:.
Terminated
